generated_queries: site:gov.mx "protección de menores" OR "seguridad infantil" AND "regulación" AND "2023"

signals.title: Reformas al Código Penal Federal para la Protección de Menores
signals.summary: An initiative to reform articles 202 and 261 of the Federal Penal Code was presented, focusing on strengthening penalties against crimes affecting minors.
key_provisions: Strengthening penalties for crimes against minors

signals.title: Propuesta de Reforma a la Ley General de Educación
signals.summary: A reform to article 13 of the General Education Law was proposed to enhance the protection of minors in the educational environment.
key_provisions: Enhancing protection of minors in education

signals.title: Iniciativa para Combatir el Abuso Sexual Infantil en Escuelas
signals.summary: An initiative was presented to establish stricter measures for preventing and punishing child sexual abuse in educational institutions.
key_provisions: Stricter measures against child sexual abuse in schools

signals.title: Propuesta de Reforma a la Ley General de los Derechos de Niñas, Niños y Adolescentes
signals.summary: An initiative was presented to reform the General Law on the Rights of Children and Adolescents, focusing on protection against vicarious violence.

signals.title: Propuesta de Ley Federal de Comercio Electrónico
signals.summary: A proposal for a federal law to regulate digital commerce was developed, aiming to consolidate consumer and business rights and ensure user cybersecurity.
key_provisions: Consolidation of consumer and business rights

signals.title: Reforma a la Ley Federal de Protección al Consumidor
signals.summary: An initiative to reform the Federal Consumer Protection Law was presented, requiring e-commerce platforms to display total product prices upfront.
key_provisions: Display of total product prices upfront

signals.title: Aprobación de la Nueva Ley de Aduanas
signals.summary: The Mexican Congress approved a new Customs Law to enhance customs oversight, increase agent responsibilities, and promote digitalization of customs processes.
